name: passwd-shadow-empty-password-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 05 auth password and empty password'; echo 'COMMAND: cat /etc/passwd; shadow status'; cat /etc/passwd; echo '--- shadow status ---'; awk -F: '{if($2=="") s="EMPTY"; else if($2 ~ /^[!*]/) s="LOCKED"; else s="SET"; print $1":"s}' /etc/shadow; echo 'END ROW 05'

name: login-defs-password-policy
command: clear; echo 'ROW 06 password policy'; echo 'COMMAND: grep PASS_* /etc/login.defs'; grep -E '^\s*PASS_(MAX_DAYS|MIN_DAYS|MIN_LEN|WARN_AGE)' /etc/login.defs; echo 'END ROW 06'
